name: gridpoint-fixity
full_name: Gridpoint Fixity and Direct Gridpoint Conditions
description: Gridpoint fix/free commands constrain or release specific degrees of freedom or scalar gridpoint quantities. They are useful for direct nodal constraints and for non-surface selections.

notes: FLAC2D uses x/y translational degrees of freedom; z velocity fixity is FLAC3D-only.
Use 'zone gridpoint free velocity-x' or related keywords to release a condition.
Direct forces do not account for boundary face area; use face stress conditions when traction is intended.
Fluid and thermal keywords require the corresponding model configuration when solving coupled processes.

common_patterns.name: Fixed base in vertical direction
commands: zone gridpoint fix velocity-y 0 range position-y 0

common_patterns.name: Release a pore-pressure constraint
commands: zone gridpoint free pore-pressure range group 'drain'
